titleStmt.title: SII 37.13: original edition by S. Nagarjuna and K. Munirathnam
No. 13. (A.R. No. 449 of 1938-39.) Mācherla, Palnad Taluk, Guntur District.

summary.p: Broken pillar kept in the Tahsildar's office compound.
This is dated Śaka 1056, Ānanda (expressed by the chronogram tarka-bāṇa-aṁbara-śaśi, Pushya ba. 15, Solar eclipse corresponding to 1135 A.D., January 16, Wednesday.

Incomplete. It records the gift of the village Koppunūru situated in Pallināṇḍu-300, without the let and hindrance, by Mallika, son of Kēśava, for worship and offerings to god Kāḍēśvara. The deity is stated to have been consecrated by Trilōchanapallava at Mahādēvitaṭāka (i.e., modern Mācherla).

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
ta¨rkkabāṇāṁbaraśaśi saṁkhyā
Ānaṁda saṁvatsara pauṣya
ṣṇa paṁcādasyāḥ sū[¨r]yya
grahaṇa nimittē mahādēvi
taṭākābhyidhānapurē trilōca
napallava pratiṣṭhitāma kā
ḍēśvarākhyāya śivāya . 15
. kēśavaputrēṇa mahāma
hēśvarēṇa mallikākhyēna prabhō
dhitātēdvaśaḥ pallināṁḍu dēśa
śatatraya va¨rtinaḥ koppunū
ru vākhyaṁ grāmaṁ nivēdhyā
dyupabhōgā¨rtthaṁ sa¨rvvabādhā
parihāraṁ prādāt . Asmi
n grāmādikē dēvadravyē tva
mēva mallikākhyam Amā
tyatvēna namōya
Digital edition of SII 37.13 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
